releaseNotes:
fix: add OkHttp/Okio ProGuard rules and keep UpdateInfo for release builds

R8 obfuscates okio internals and can strip UpdateInfo fields in release,
causing the update checker to throw an exception → "Check your internet
connection" error. Fix:
- Keep okhttp3.** and okio.** classes/interfaces
- dontwarn for both (consumer rules not always inherited transitively)
- Keep com.gymtracker.util.UpdateInfo for Gson reflection (was only
  covering com.gymtracker.data.**)
- Bump to 1.9.0 (versionCode 10)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
